title: carex pilosa var. auriculata
intro: Carex pilosa var. auriculata is a variety of the Carex pilosa plant, also known as the hairy-fruited sedge, a type of flowering plant in the sedge family (Cyperaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Carex pilosa var. auriculata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. It is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, where it can be consumed as a tea or taken as a supplement to support overall health and well-being.
